filesModified.purpose: CHANGE-001: Replace __experimentalLinkControl + BlockControls + Popover with @taktdev/components Link component. CHANGE-002: Defer IconPicker rendering until block is selected.
CHANGE-003: Add explicit defaults for logoId (null) and iconSlug ('')

testPage.note: Editor-only changes; PHP frontend template unchanged

fixesApplied.description: Removed: useState, useRef from @wordpress/element; __experimentalLinkControl, BlockControls from @wordpress/block-editor; ToolbarGroup, ToolbarButton, Popover, ToggleControl, TextControl from @wordpress/components; link icon from @wordpress/icons. Added: Link from @taktdev/components (already imported alongside IconPicker). The Link component wraps the anchor, handles the focus-triggered popover with LinkControl + ToggleControl (open in new tab) + TextControl (aria label) internally. The onChange callback merges link fields and calls renameBlock for the title field. No explicit BlockControls needed.

Added isSelected prop to EditProps. When isSelected is true, renders the full IconPicker (with its MediaUpload). When isSelected is false, renders a lightweight static fallback: finds the SVG component from suggestedIcons by iconSlug and renders it directly, or shows a small placeholder span. This prevents MediaUploadCheck + MediaUpload from mounting during block insertion, eliminating the extra core-data store operations that triggered the editEntityRecord race condition.
Added 'default': null to logoId and 'default': '' to iconSlug. Prevents undefined attribute values during block creation.
Removed unused import of __ from @wordpress/i18n (no translatable strings remain in the component after removing the manual link UI).
